evals.prompt: this function has way too many comments. clean up the comments so only the important ones remain. don't touch the code itself. file: coilFluxCalc.m
evals.expected_output: Same code logic, comment count drastically reduced; remaining comments concise English phrases covering only units/conventions/key step; no narration comments; no header/H1 added

evals.prompt: add comments to computeThd.m so a junior student can follow the signal processing steps
evals.expected_output: Few concise English comments at algorithm-critical points only (windowing, single-sided spectrum scaling, harmonic peak search, THD definition); units in parentheses; code unchanged; no H1/help block added

evals.prompt: abc2dq.m 함수에 주석 좀 달아줘. 주석은 한국어로 부탁해
evals.expected_output: Concise Korean comments (identifiers/units stay English) at critical points: Clarke/Park transform identification, theta convention; code unchanged; no header added
